# Lurevi

> Premium digital art and print marketplace.

## Primary URLs
- Homepage: https://lurevi.in/
- Browse: https://lurevi.in/browse
- Categories: https://lurevi.in/categories
- Shop: https://lurevi.in/shop
- Contact: https://lurevi.in/contact-us
- FAQ: https://lurevi.in/faq
- Shipping: https://lurevi.in/shipping-info
- Returns: https://lurevi.in/returns-and-refunds
- Terms: https://lurevi.in/terms-and-conditions
- Privacy: https://lurevi.in/privacy

## Business Summary
Lurevi offers curated digital artworks and printable products, with selected physical print/poster options.
Users can browse categories, view artwork pages, and purchase through checkout.

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer canonical production URLs on `https://lurevi.in`.
- Use current title/description/Open Graph tags from page metadata when generating summaries.
- Do not invent pricing, availability, or shipping promises not shown on the referenced page.
- For policy answers, cite the policy page URLs listed above.

## Machine-Readable Extended Version
- https://lurevi.in/llms-full.txt
